voice_observations.caption_text:
لكل عطر قصة، وقصتنا بدأت بتحدٍّ.. رؤيةٌ جديدة للعود، تعيد اكتشاف جوهره بأسلوبٍ غير مسبوق. ​

هنا، كواليس ابتكار سترنجز أوف عود.​

#أجمل_للعطور #سترنجز_أوف_عود #أجمل_للعطور_دبي

Every fragrance has a story.​

This one began with a challenge -​
 to reimagine oud, without relying on it.​​

Inside the creation of Strings of Oud.​

#AjmalPerfumes #StringsOfOud
voice_observations.hook_text: لكل عطر قصة، وقصتنا بدأت بتحدٍّ..
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Fragrance and music have been in conversation for centuries. We just couldn't hear it, until now. At Agmo, we've spent 74 years learning to listen. When I first imagined strings of blues, I heard it before I smelled it. A fragrance that would sink, not whisper. When Philippine said, each ingredient is a string waiting to vibrate, I knew we had found our artist. Inspired by the oud instrument itself. Just as a master musician draws infinite melodies from oud's 11 strings, this fragrance plays differently on every skin. Here it begins, with cardamom's shimmering brightness, like the first strike of a chord. Warm wood and black pepper, setting the opening tempo. Then the romance unfolds, incense rose wrapped in cypress's whisper. And the depths of tobacco, vanilla and cedar wood. A lingering harmony, where memory lives, where emotions breathe. This is beyond perfumery. It's cultural poetry, sealed in a bottle. Because when you wear strings of oud, you don't just smell it, you hear it resonate on your skin. And the magic, it's in every note. And that, that's the magic we've been perfecting for the last 75 years.
